description: Submit completed maintenance work. For validate and freshen tasks, includes a verdict (pass/fail or fresh/stale) and evidence hash. For compress tasks, includes the new content hash and size metrics. For enrich tasks, includes the enriched metadata. The antecedent is the agent's own assign-claim message. Uses --fulfills to complete the assign future once the exchange issues assign-accept.

args.name: target
args.description: Message ID of the agent's exchange:assign-claim message.

args.name: task_type
args.description: Type of work performed. Must match the original assignment's task_type.

args.name: verdict
args.description: Work verdict. Required for validate (pass/fail) and freshen (fresh/stale) tasks. Not used for compress or enrich. Composed into exchange:assign-verdict:<value> tag.

args.name: evidence_hash
args.description: SHA-256 hash of the evidence supporting the verdict. For validate: the worker's independent inference output. For freshen: the worker's re-derived result. For compress: the compressed content. For enrich: the enrichment payload. Stored externally like cache entry content.

args.name: size_original
args.description: Original content size in bytes. Required for compress tasks.

args.name: size_compressed
args.description: Compressed content size in bytes. Required for compress tasks. Must achieve >= 30% reduction.

args.name: enrichment
args.description: Enriched metadata for enrich tasks. Object with optional fields: description (string, max 4096), domains (tag_set, max 5), summary (string, max 2048). At least one field must be present.
